title: Manufacturing Engineer - Rahu Catalysts - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Rahu Catalysts - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? Rahu Catalysts in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Rahu Catalysts:
Rahu Catalysts is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rahu Catalysts!
